rationale: Educ. Code §43.063 governs the powers and duties of the permanent school fund corporation regarding investment management and corporate governance. It does not address residence homestead exemptions or school funding formulas tied to local property tax appraisals.
quote: The corporation may engage in any activity necessary to manage the investments of the permanent school fund
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not implicate any operative provision of Educ. Code §43.063, which concerns corporate governance and investment authority for the permanent school fund.
